title: Will UFO technology unite the world or tear us apart?
summary: This interview segment discusses the potential dual-use nature of UFO/UAP technology, comparing it to a toy that all children want but few can share. The discussion explores whether such technology could unite humanity or cause irreparable division given current global conflicts.

key_claims.claim: UFO/UAP technology has the potential to either unite humanity or completely tear it apart with no recovery
Countries will use advanced technology if they feel they have to during conflict, citing the US dropping the atomic bomb as precedent
